title: PrimeTimber - Just a better Timber mod!
description: Advaned Timber Mod with better timber selection algorithm and visualization
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/685fbd25f51d2fb7fd2ebb71d28416cbd2d81ba0.png)

Advaned Timber Mod with better timber selection algorithm and visualization.

## Usage
1. Hold down the trigger-key (Default: Left Shift)
2. Look at a tree-stem with an axe
3. An outline appear around the tree
4. If its grean you can break the whole tree with just destroing one block
5. If its red your tool doesnt have enough durability

## Features
* Improved tree detection algorithm for more accurate timber selection.
* Visual indicators showing which blocks will be felled before you cut the tree.
* Keybinding customization.

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hxXLr4De/images/916cf2bf765baa109028b347d3b17fdc3753ddff.gif)

![Example enough durability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hxXLr4De/images/4f3c4e7f97f50bd29bfd49df5529add26353fb45_350.webp)

![Example not enough durability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hxXLr4De/images/75c4df1e557941a6c1e4202a888aaf30c8289058_350.webp)
